title: Heavy-Duty Crane Hook
engineering_intent: Drafted a load-bearing crane hook with a threaded mounting shank. Emphasized the precise construction of intersecting radii (R47/R35) critical for safe structural load distribution.

title: Standard Spur Gear Profile
engineering_intent: Constructed an involute spur gear profile for a 26-tooth gear. Calculated and drafted the specific pitch circle diameter, root circle, and addendum angles according to standard gear modules.

title: Radial Impeller Profile
engineering_intent: Detailed the blade sweep and hub geometry for a radial fluid impeller. Utilized polar arrays for uniform blade distribution and defined complex tangential boundary radii.

title: Geneva Drive Indexing Wheel
engineering_intent: Engineered the 2D profile for a 6-slot Geneva mechanism. Specified internal pitch circle diameters (PCD) and precise slot geometry for intermittent rotational motion.

title: Connecting Rod Orthographics
engineering_intent: Generated multi-view orthographic projections of a connecting rod. Included a cross-sectional view to specify material web thickness and primary bore diameters.

title: Belt & Pulley Kinematic Layout
engineering_intent: Drafted the 2D pitch line layout for a three-point pulley system. Calculated and applied continuous tangent lines across varying radial hubs for power transmission.

title: Cross-Hub Mounting Plate
engineering_intent: Detailed a symmetric four-point cross hub. Utilized polar coordinate dimensioning and precise angular spacing for rotational balance.

title: Angled Lever Arm
engineering_intent: Drafted an angled mechanical lever utilizing parallel elliptical boundaries. Applied specific corner radii to mitigate stress concentration at the fulcrum.

title: Mechanical Linkage Profile
engineering_intent: Drafted a planar linkage arm featuring complex tangential arcs, an internal elliptical slot, and a customized polygonal bore.

title: Contoured Rotational Profile
engineering_intent: Defined the 2D sweep profile for a contoured shaft, specifying precise transition radii essential for lathe turning operations.

title: Custom Flange Plate
engineering_intent: Constructed a 2D planar profile featuring inscribed polygons and elliptical boundaries with precise coordinate dimensioning.
